name: Territorial Expanse
effect: Increase production of Citadels/Necropolises/Labyrinths (by alignment) based on assistants owned.

name: Evolutive Mutation
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on highest Labyrinths built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(12 + 3 * x^0.6)%, where x = highest Labyrinths this Reincarnation

name: Deep Memory
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on time spent in your longest Era this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = longest Era time this Reincarnation

name: Gold Synthesis
effect: Increase production of Neutral buildings based on coins owned.

name: Mitosis
effect: Gain assistants based on buildings built.

name: Overgrowth
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest buildings built this Reincarnation.
formula: (2 * x^0.75)%, where x = highest buildings built this Reincarnation

name: Magical Treasures
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on assistants owned.

name: Abominations
effect: Increase production of assistants based on active spells.

name: Hive Mind
effect: Increase production based on total time affiliated with Faceless (All Time).

name: Primal Knowledge
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance based on highest Forbidden Libraries this Reincarnation. Grows over time, resets every 15 minutes.
formula: ((t%900)/60 * x^0.6)%, t = time this Era, x = highest Forbidden Libraries

name: Forbidden Language
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Brainwave duration. Also multiplicatively increase Brainwave headstart by 100%.

name: Dimension Door
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Maximum Mana this Reincarnation.
formula: (2.25 * ln(1+x)^2.25)%, where x = highest Max Mana this Reincarnation
